heroInsight.label: Most important today
heroInsight.text: Pending across 8 invoices. Two customers are likely to pay late.

recommendations.title: Reorder blue cotton shirts today
recommendations.text: At the current sales rate, this SKU will stock out in 6 days. Suggested reorder: 80 units.

recommendations.title: Follow up with Mehta Stores
recommendations.text: Invoice INV-1048 is overdue by 12 days. Payment probability improves if contacted before 4 PM.

recommendations.title: Prioritise Ahuja Retail
recommendations.text: High-intent WhatsApp enquiry. Estimated order value ₹76,000 with 88% conversion probability.

activity.title: New WhatsApp enquiry
activity.text: Ahuja Retail asked for 120 formal shirts. Lead created automatically.

activity.title: UPI payment matched
activity.text: ₹24,850 received from Ramesh Traders and linked to INV-1042.

activity.title: Tally sync completed
activity.text: 18 invoices, 6 purchases and 3 credit notes updated.
